title: 200 Ogun Pupils Empowered through Mind Challenge Initiative by Dolly Children Foundation and Reel Foundation - FinancialEDGE
description: Over 200 pupils from 26 public and private schools gathered at Makogi Primary School for the inaugural edition of the Ultimate Mind Challenge, a day-long event that blended fun with critical thinking and competition. Organized by the REEL Foundation in collaboration with Dolly Children Foundation and proudly supported by the Britain Nigeria Educational Trust (BNET),
html: Over 200 pupils from 26 public and private schools gathered at Makogi Primary School for the inaugural edition of the Ultimate Mind Challenge, a day-long event that blended fun with critical thinking and competition.
